items.title: FastAPI
items.description: Strong FastAPI skills with production experience. Built REST APIs with Pydantic models, async views, and dependency injection. Used with PostgreSQL and Redis.
items.evidence_text: FastAPI skill with production experience. Built REST APIs with proper validation, async support, and database integration.

items.title: API Service
items.description: REST API service built with FastAPI. Features include user authentication, data validation with Pydantic, and PostgreSQL database integration. Added Redis caching for performance.
items.evidence_text: API Service project built with FastAPI, PostgreSQL, and Redis. Implemented authentication, data validation, and caching.
